note: Published posting & send schedule shown on the Campaign Studio's Calendar tab. To update it: open index.html#calendar-edit, make your changes, click 'Download calendar.json', then upload the downloaded file here (replacing this one).

entries.title: Save the Date email
entries.copy:
Subject: Happy Independence Day. Now save the date for ours.
Preview: October 17 at the Dallas Zoo. The White Cane Day Walk is back.

entries.title: Disability Pride Month post
entries.copy: This Disability Pride Month, we celebrate the community and independence at the heart of the White Cane Day Walk. Join Envision at the Dallas Zoo on Oct. 17 and walk with us for independence across North Texas. whitecanedaywalk.com
entries.notes: Make the graphic in the Generator (Social mode)

entries.title: Disability Pride Month post
entries.copy: This Disability Pride Month, we celebrate the community and independence at the heart of the White Cane Day Walk. Join Envision at the Dallas Zoo on Oct. 17 and walk with us for independence across North Texas. Link in bio.
entries.notes: Make the square graphic in the Generator (Social mode)

entries.title: Registration Open email
entries.copy:
Subject: Registration is open for the White Cane Day Walk
Preview: Reserve your place for Saturday, October 17 at the Dallas Zoo.

entries.title: Registration now open post
entries.copy: Registration is open. Join Envision at the Dallas Zoo on Saturday, Oct. 17 and walk with us for independence. Register, start a team or make a gift to support Envision's work for people who are blind or have low vision across North Texas. whitecanedaywalk.com
entries.notes: Pair with the Registration Now Open banner or make a graphic in the Generator
